2606.14240.title: AFFORDANCE20Q: Evaluating Affordance Reasoning from Physical Properties
2606.14240.paper_summary: Affordance reasoning, the inference of an object's action possibilities from its physical properties (e.g., shape and material), is fundamental to human physical understanding and increasingly critical for Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing affordance benchmarks largely expose explicit object identities in the evaluation setup, allowing models to rely on memorized object-affordance mappings rather than reasoning over physical properties. To address this gap, we introduce Affordance20Q, a novel affordance reasoning benchmark formulated as a 20-Questions game without exposing the object's identity. In each game, the model identifies a hidden object's affordance from a candidate set by asking yes/no questions about its physical properties. Affordance20Q comprises 1,009 games over 454 objects and 59 affordances, all manually filtered, refined, and annotated. We conduct comprehensive experiments with 15 state-of-the-art LLMs and find a substantial gap (~20 points) compared to human performance. A KL-based information-gain (IG) analysis further shows that models fail to ask discriminating questions as the game progresses. To close the gap, we develop KB-Anchored Rule Induction (KARI), a pipeline based on LLMs that generates affordance rules grounded in evidence from knowledge bases (KBs). KARI improves open-source LLMs by up to 15.2 points, while the limited coverage of KBs hinders further gains. We release all our code and data at https://github.com/1171-jpg/Affordance20Q.git
2606.14240.paper_summary_zh: 可供性推理，即從物體的物理特性（例如形狀和材料）推斷其行動可能性，對於人類的物理理解至關重要，並且對於大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越重要。然而，現有的可供性基準在評估設置中大多暴露了明確的物體身份，使模型能夠依賴於記憶中的物體-可供性映射，而不是對物理特性進行推理。為了解決這一差距，我們引入了Affordance20Q，這是一個新穎的可供性推理基準，形式為一個不暴露物體身份的20問遊戲。在每個遊戲中，模型通過詢問有關物體物理特性的是/否問題來識別隱藏物體的可供性。Affordance20Q包含1,009個遊戲，涵蓋454個物體和59種可供性，所有遊戲均經過手動篩選、精煉和註釋。我們對15個最先進的LLMs進行了全面實驗，發現與人類表現相比存在顯著差距（約20分）。基於KL的信息增益（IG）分析進一步顯示，隨著遊戲的進展，模型未能提出具有區分性的問題。為了縮小這一差距，我們開發了基於知識庫（KB）的規則歸納（KARI），這是一個基於LLMs的流程，生成基於知識庫證據的可供性規則。KARI使開源LLMs的表現提高了最多15.2分，而知識庫的有限覆蓋則阻礙了進一步的提升。我們在https://github.com/1171-jpg/Affordance20Q.git上發布了我們的所有代碼和數據。
2606.14240.author: Yifan Jiang et.al.
2606.14240.authors: Yifan Jiang, Meige Yang, Zitong Li, Jay Pujara
